title: Add Declaration Section with English & Hindi Text and Acknowledgement Checkbox

requirements.summary: Create or update the GuardianDeclarationSection component to display both English and Hindi declaration texts with an acknowledgement checkbox
acceptanceCriteria: The Declaration section appears as the last section of the admission form, after all other sections including Parent's Details.
The English declaration text is displayed in full and clearly readable.
The Hindi declaration text is displayed in full beneath the English text, using a font that correctly renders Devanagari script.
A checkbox is present below both texts with labels in both English and Hindi.
The checkbox state is tracked in the form and can be toggled by the user.
The section is visually consistent with other form sections (card layout, matching styling).

file_operations.description: Update the component to display the full English declaration text ('All the information given by my son/daughter in this form and all the certificates attached are true. If found false, the school administration will have the right to take all legal action. I will not appeal against this. My son/daughter will follow the orders, instructions and rules issued by the school administration. If this is not done, the school administration will be free to expel the student. The school administration will not be responsible for getting or not getting government benefits. 75% attendance is mandatory and must be present in the school uniform (dress)') followed by the Hindi declaration text ('मेरे बेटे/बेटी द्वारा इस फॉर्म में दी गई सभी जानकारी और संलग्न सभी प्रमाण पत्र सत्य हैं। यदि असत्य पाया गया तो विद्यालय प्रशासन को सभी कानूनी कार्रवाई करने का अधिकार होगा। मैं इसके विरुद्ध अपील नहीं करूँगा/करूँगी। मेरा बेटा/बेटी विद्यालय प्रशासन द्वारा जारी आदेशों, निर्देशों और नियमों का पालन करेगा/करेगी। यदि ऐसा नहीं किया गया, तो विद्यालय प्रशासन छात्र को निष्कासित करने के लिए स्वतंत्र होगा। सरकारी लाभ मिलने या न मिलने के लिए विद्यालय प्रशासन जिम्मेदार नहीं होगा। 75% उपस्थिति अनिवार्य है और विद्यालय की वर्दी (ड्रेस) में उपस्थित रहना आवश्यक है।') stacked vertically. Add a checkbox with bilingual labels ('I / We have read and agree to the above declaration' and 'मैंने/हमने उपरोक्त घोषणा पढ़ी है और सहमत हैं'). Accept props for guardianDeclaration (boolean), setGuardianDeclaration callback, and disabled state. Use Card component for consistent styling with other form sections. Ensure proper Devanagari font rendering.

requirements.summary: Integrate the GuardianDeclarationSection into AdmissionFormPage as the final section and wire the checkbox state into the form state
acceptanceCriteria: The Declaration section is the last visible section when scrolling through the full admission form.
The checkbox value is included in the form data object passed to save-draft and submit actions.
No existing form sections are displaced or removed.
The section is rendered correctly in both enabled and disabled (submitted) form states.

file_operations.description: Import and render the GuardianDeclarationSection component as the last section in the form, after all existing sections (PersonalDetailsSection, AddressSection, ContactDetailsSection, StudentIdentifiersSection, BankDetailsSection, PreviousExamSection, subject selection components). Wire the guardianDeclaration checkbox state into the formData object using formData.guardianDeclaration and setFormData. Pass the disabled prop (studentData?.status === 'approved' || studentData?.status === 'rejected') to the GuardianDeclarationSection. Ensure the guardianDeclaration value is included in both saveDraft and submitForm mutation calls. Do not add validation that blocks submission based on this checkbox; it is an acknowledgement field only.
